text: The integration of PAK into the curricula of theological colleges is not only academically sound but also spiritually relevant. Philosophy as the pursuit of wisdom is also uniquely aligned with the biblical world view. Therefore, this research aims to investigate the impact that the philosophy component of PAK has on the intellectual and spiritual growth of students at theological colleges so that they may attain wise thinking, feeling and behaviour. In so doing the study also aims to illustrate that the holy scriptures may serve as the normative standard for philosophical investigations of faith and reason, thereby redressing the aparent dichotomy between these two concepts. The research conclusively affirms that philosophical study of any kind is vital for the intellectual, spiritual and practical growth of students in theological colleges and thus for the entire body of Christ.
